mapper.sql: r.id, r.title, r.title_image as titleImage, u.nickname, r.like_count as likeCount, r.comment_count as commentCount, r.view_count as viewCount, (r.like_count * 3 + r.comment_count * 2 + r.view_count * 1) as popularityScore, d.name as difficultyLabel, r.cooking_time as cookingTime, r.created_at as createdAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM recipes r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id JOIN difficulties d ON r.difficulty_id = d.id WHERE r.created_at >= CURDATE() AND r.is_public = 1 AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY popularityScore DESC, r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM recipes r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id JOIN difficulties d ON r.difficulty_id = d.id WHERE r.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND r.is_public = 1 AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY popularityScore DESC, r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
